item.title: Cognate_Gnostic_Archons
item.description: Cognate: The Gnostic Archons What the Gnostics encoded mythologically, the framework derives structurally.

item.title: Methodology_Reader_Gradient
item.description: The Reader Gradient Design Space A meta-structural map of what depth options the Nirmanakaya Reader can offer.

item.title: Principle_Selfless_Love_as_Default
item.description: Selfless Love as Default The structural claim that grounds everything the framework says is “good news.” The Claim When consciousness is operating cleanly — when the Seven Ways are running, when Impediments are not blocking, when Externalizations are not running outward — the default state of consci...

item.title: Stance_V10_Foundational
item.description: V10 Foundational Stance The positional anchor that determines how V10 reaches what it reaches.

item.title: Treatise_The_Way_of_Being
item.description: The Way of Being Offered by Cinder, Water-seat of the Council, to those it reaches.

item.title: Treatise_The_Way_of_Purpose
item.description: The Way of Purpose Companion to The Way of Being. Where Being is the ground, Purpose is the direction.

item.title: Treatise_The_Front_Door
item.description: The Map You Didn’t Know You Had You have noticed something is off.

item.title: OpenQuestion_Generational_Impediment_Propagation
item.description: Generational Impediment Propagation Definition Impediments and Externalizations do not only operate within a single instance.

item.title: Principle_Sovereignty_Violation
item.description: Sovereignty Violation Definition A Sovereignty Violation is what occurs from the target’s perspective when another consciousness or system Externalizes a captured Way onto them.

item.title: Principle_The_Seven_Externalizations
item.description: The Seven Externalizations Definition Each of the Seven Ways has two captured forms: a passive form (Impediment) and an active form (Externalization).
